job_title: Machine Learning Engineer — On-device Control and Optimization, Core OS
job_nlp_title: Machine Learning Engineer — On-device Control and Optimization, Core OS
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Model predictive control, Optimal control, Reinforcement learning, Data analysis from raw logs, sensor data
skill_match_scores: Model predictive control:0.0, Optimal control:0.0, Reinforcement learning:1.0, Data analysis from raw logs:0.0, Sensor data:0.0
must_have_quals: MS or PhD in controls, robotics, electrical engineering, computer science, or other quantitative field — or BS with relevant experience, Experience with model predictive control, optimal control, or reinforcement learning (sequential decision-making), Experience working from raw logs or sensor data — comfortable building analysis from scratch, Strong Python skills; demonstrated ability to take a project from data exploration through working prototype
preferred_quals: Experience with thermal systems, battery management, or energy optimization, Familiarity with embedded or resource-constrained environments, Hands-on ML experience — training models, evaluating tradeoffs, iterating on approaches rather than applying off-the-shelf solutions, Comfort with ambiguity — able to scope and drive work without detailed specifications, Track record of shipping models or control systems into production, not just research
core_responsibilities: Dig into raw device logs and field data to build understanding of device behavior, find opportunities, and validate models, Model device thermal and energy dynamics using lab and field data, Develop and evaluate ML and control systems for on-device management, Rapidly prototype end-to-end systems, from data analysis to device deployment, collaborating with firmware, hardware, and platform teams
job_summary: Apple is a leading technology company that builds systems for managing the energy flow and thermals of its devices. The Machine Learning Engineer will develop end-to-end solutions utilizing on-device machine learning and control, impacting the behavior of Apple devices across product families.
